column_provenance.domains: MeSH 2025 (med), US Courts glossary (law), curated term lists (stem/cs/fin)
column_provenance.flags: mostly derived (proper from pos, inflected from root, contraction from apostrophe); prof/slur/sexual from LDNOOBW
column_provenance.pos: WordNet 3.0, with spaCy fallback + curated function-word table

sources.LDNOOBW: Shutterstock, CC BY 4.0 — source for the prof/slur/sexual flags only (a small minority of the flags column)
sources.MeSH 2025: US National Library of Medicine, public domain (US Government work)
sources.US Courts glossary: Administrative Office of the US Courts, public domain (US Government work)
sources.WikiText-103: Salesforce / Wikipedia contributors, CC BY-SA (bigrams source)
sources.concrete/aoa ratings: model-estimated (Claude), original generated data — NOT the Brysbaert/Kuperman empirical datasets
sources.curated term lists: STEM/CS/Finance + Latin phrases — factual word lists authored for Fluera, no third-party licence
sources.wordfreq: Robyn Speer 2022, Apache-2.0 code + CC BY-SA 4.0 data (bundles SUBTLEX-US with explicit commercial permission from Marc Brysbaert via wordfreq NOTICE.md)
